case_title: YESSLIN MEYLIN SUAREZ VS. CINDY ANGELA MELO CASIMIR ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUAREZ, YESSLIN MEYLIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>) SERVED SEP-29-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MELO CASIMIR, CINDY ANGELA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,550.00 FILED BY SUAREZ, YESSLIN MEYLIN AS TO DEFENDANT MELO CASIMIR, CINDY ANGELA CONDOR, ABEL MELO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>) SERVED SEP-29-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONDOR, ABEL MELO
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF SUAREZ, YESSLIN MEYLIN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF YESSLIN MEYLIN SUAREZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CINDY ANGELA MELO CASIMIR IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY USING GOOGLE TRANSLATE FOR ENGLISH TO SPANISH TRANSLATION WITH THE CLERK. DEFENDANT ABEL MELO CONDOR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506) ** LATER THE DEFENDANT APPEARED IN COURT AT 2:10 P.M., ASSISTED BY USING GOOGLE TRANSLATE FOR ENGLISH TO SPANISH TRANSLATION WITH THE CLERK TO INFORM HER THE CASE WAS ORDERED DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF WHEN ATTENDANCE WAS TAKEN AT 1:30 P.M.**
